title: vatica oblongifolia subsp. crassilobata
intro: Vatica oblongifolia subsp. crassilobata is a subspecies of tree native to Malaysia, known for its medicinal properties and various health benefits. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Vatica oblongifolia subsp. crassilobata include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
